org.apache.dubbo.remoting.p2p.support

类 ServerPeer

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.apache.dubbo.remoting.transport.ServerDelegate
      • org.apache.dubbo.remoting.p2p.support.ServerPeer
  • 所有已实现的接口:
    Resetable, Endpoint, IdleSensible, Peer, RemotingServer

    public class ServerPeer
extends ServerDelegate
implements Peer
    ServerPeer

      所有方法 实例方法 具体方法 
      限定符和类型 方法和说明

      close the channel.
      Channel getChannel(InetSocketAddress remoteAddress)
      get channel.

      get channels.

      send message.

      • 从类继承的方法 org.apache.dubbo.remoting.transport.ServerDelegate

        close, getChannelHandler, getLocalAddress, getServer, getUrl, isBound, isClosed, reset, reset, setServer, startClose

      • send

          throws RemotingException

      • send

        public void send(Object message,
                 boolean sent)
          throws RemotingException
        从接口复制的说明: Endpoint
        send message.
        指定者:
        send 在接口中 Endpoint
        覆盖:
        send 在类中 ServerDelegate
        sent - already sent to socket?
        抛出:
        RemotingException
